# Plan: Remove footer from plans page

## Task Description
Remove the `<footer>` element from the plans variant merch card render layout. The footer currently contains a secure transaction label and a `<slot name="footer">` (used for CTAs/buy buttons). The footer element should be removed from the plans page layout while preserving CTA rendering by moving `<slot name="footer">` into the `.body` div. Dead CSS targeting `<footer>` in the plans variant should also be cleaned up.

## Relevant Files

- `web-components/src/variants/plans.js` — Contains `renderLayout()` which renders `${this.secureLabelFooter}`, and `variantStyle` CSS with footer-specific rules. Primary file to edit.
- `web-components/src/variants/variant-layout.js` — Defines the shared `secureLabelFooter` getter. Read-only — do not modify (shared by other variants).
- `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js` — Contains global CSS for plans variant. Has `[slot="footer"]` styles that remain valid and should not be removed.

## Step by Step Tasks

### 1. Remove `secureLabelFooter` from `renderLayout()` in `plans.js`
- In `renderLayout()` (line ~329), remove `${this.secureLabelFooter}` from the template literal
- Add `<slot name="footer"></slot>` at the bottom of the `.body` div, after `<slot name="badge"></slot>`, so CTAs continue to render

### 2. Remove dead footer CSS from `variantStyle` in `plans.js`
- Remove the `:host([variant^='plans']) footer { ... }` rule (padding styles)
- Remove the `:host([variant^='plans']) footer ::slotted([slot='addon']) { ... }` rule
- Remove the `:host([variant='plans']) .wide-footer #stock-checkbox { ... }` rule (wide-footer class is only added to the now-removed footer element)

### 3. Validate no breakage in `adjustSlotPlacement`
- The `adjustSlotPlacement` method queries `shadowRoot.querySelector('footer')` — with footer removed it returns `null` and the `footer?.classList` optional chains are safe no-ops
- No changes needed; verify the method handles null footer gracefully (it does via optional chaining)

## Acceptance Criteria
- The plans merch card renders without a `<footer>` element in its shadow DOM
- CTAs (slot="footer" content) still render inside the `.body` div
- The secure transaction label is no longer shown on plans cards
- No layout breakage — body padding and card structure intact
- No unused CSS rules targeting `<footer>` remain in `plans.js` variantStyle
- Other variants (product, catalog, segment, etc.) are unaffected

## Validation Commands
- `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.js`

## Task Description
Remove the `<footer>` element from the plans variant merch card render layout. The footer currently contains a secure transaction label and a `<slot name="footer">` (used for CTAs/buy buttons). The footer element should be removed from the plans page layout while preserving CTA rendering by moving `<slot name="footer">` into the `.body` div. Dead CSS targeting `<footer>` in the plans variant should also be cleaned up.

## Relevant Files

- `web-components/src/variants/plans.js` — Contains `renderLayout()` which renders `${this.secureLabelFooter}`, and `variantStyle` CSS with footer-specific rules. Primary file to edit.
- `web-components/src/variants/variant-layout.js` — Defines the shared `secureLabelFooter` getter. Read-only — do not modify (shared by other variants).
- `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js` — Contains global CSS for plans variant. Has `[slot="footer"]` styles that remain valid and should not be removed.

## Step by Step Tasks

### 1. Remove `secureLabelFooter` from `renderLayout()` in `plans.js`
- In `renderLayout()` (line ~329), remove `${this.secureLabelFooter}` from the template literal
- Add `<slot name="footer"></slot>` at the bottom of the `.body` div, after `<slot name="badge"></slot>`, so CTAs continue to render

### 2. Remove dead footer CSS from `variantStyle` in `plans.js`
- Remove the `:host([variant^='plans']) footer { ... }` rule (padding styles)
- Remove the `:host([variant^='plans']) footer ::slotted([slot='addon']) { ... }` rule
- Remove the `:host([variant='plans']) .wide-footer #stock-checkbox { ... }` rule (wide-footer class is only added to the now-removed footer element)

### 3. Validate no breakage in `adjustSlotPlacement`
- The `adjustSlotPlacement` method queries `shadowRoot.querySelector('footer')` — with footer removed it returns `null` and the `footer?.classList` optional chains are safe no-ops
- No changes needed; verify the method handles null footer gracefully (it does via optional chaining)

## Acceptance Criteria
- The plans merch card renders without a `<footer>` element in its shadow DOM
- CTAs (slot="footer" content) still render inside the `.body` div
- The secure transaction label is no longer shown on plans cards
- No layout breakage — body padding and card structure intact
- No unused CSS rules targeting `<footer>` remain in `plans.js` variantStyle
- Other variants (product, catalog, segment, etc.) are unaffected

- `node --check web-components/src/variants/plans.js`

            this.adaptForMedia,
        );

            <slot></slot>`;

        :host([variant^='plans']) {

            font-weight: 400;
            background:
                linear-gradient(white, white) padding-box,
                var(--consonant-merch-card-border-color, #dadada) border-box;
            border: 1px solid transparent;
        }

        :host([variant^='plans']) .slot-placeholder {
            display: none;
        }

        :host([variant='plans-education']) {
            min-height: unset;
        }

        :host([variant='plans-education']) ::slotted([slot='subtitle']) {
            font-size: var(--consonant-merch-card-heading-xxxs-font-size);
            line-height: var(--consonant-merch-card-heading-xxxs-line-height);
            font-style: italic;
            font-weight: 400;
        }

        :host([variant='plans-education']) .divider {
            border: 0;
            border-top: 1px solid #e8e8e8;
            margin-top: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }

        :host([variant='plans']) slot[name='subtitle'] {
            display: var(--merch-card-plans-subtitle-display);
            min-height: 18px;
            margin-top: 8px;
            margin-bottom: -8px;
        }

        :host([variant='plans']) ::slotted([slot='heading-xs']) {
            min-height: var(--merch-card-plans-heading-min-height);
        }

        :host([variant^='plans']) .body {
            min-width: var(--merch-card-plans-min-width);
            padding: var(--merch-card-plans-padding);
        }

        :host([variant='plans'][size]) .body {
            max-width: none;
        }

        :host([variant^='plans']) ::slotted([slot='addon']) {
            margin-top: auto;
            padding-top: 8px;
        }

        :host([variant='plans']) #stock-checkbox {
            margin-top: 8px;
            gap: 9px;
            color: rgb(34, 34, 34);
            line-height: var(--consonant-merch-card-detail-xs-line-height);
            padding-top: 4px;
            padding-bottom: 5px;
        }

        :host([variant='plans']) #stock-checkbox > span {
            border: 2px solid rgb(109, 109, 109);
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
        }

        :host([variant='plans']) .secure-transaction-label {
            color: rgb(80, 80, 80);
            line-height: var(--consonant-merch-card-detail-xs-line-height);
        }

        :host([variant='plans']) ::slotted([slot='heading-xs']) {
            max-width: var(--consonant-merch-card-heading-xs-max-width, 100%);
        }

        :host([variant='plans']) #badge {
            border-radius: 4px 0 0 4px;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 21px;
            padding: 2px 10px 3px;
        }
    `;
